name: @finos/git-proxy-cli
description: Command line interface tool for FINOS GitProxy.

scripts.test-coverage-ci: cd ../.. && c8 --reports-dir ./coverage-cli --include "packages/git-proxy-cli/dist/**" --exclude "packages/git-proxy-cli/test/**" --reporter lcovonly --reporter text vitest --run --dir packages/git-proxy-cli/test --test-timeout 15000

author: Miklos Sagi
